meaning: n.装在墙上作装饰或纪念用的薄金属板或瓷片
examples: The First Lady unveiled a commemorative plaque.
On one side of the main entrance there's a red plaque.
Deposits of plaque build up between the tooth and the gum.
Students will learn theory, technique and composition, ending with them creating their very own fileteado plaque.
This section twisted and turned, the occasional roadside plaque attesting to shipwrecks during the 1800 and 1900s.
